description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.33 P3 (llm-judge-runtime-fix). V1.33 P3 fix waves (commits d271115, c604a2d) closed R-V133P3-01 and R-V133P3-02; V1.35 P0 (commit 4a4ba9d) recorded closure in status.json SSOT.

entries.title: parse_judge_response: switch to first-token parse to avoid NOGO/GO substring false positive
entries.source: qc1 C-001 (V1.33 P3); same root cause as TD-V131-07 (was low, now elevated because P3 made judge.llm the real eval path)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P3 fix wave (commit d271115) — first-token parse anchored to whitespace/punctuation; NOGO check precedes GO to prevent 'nogo' matching 'go'.
entries.closure_evidence: commit d271115 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop integration; unit tests in nexus-orchestration testsuite cover go/nogo/hybrid inputs.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit d271115 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop integration; unit tests in nexus-orchestration testsuite cover go/nogo/hybrid inputs.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: LlmJudgeTask: pre-load template_file from bundle root (paths like prompts/gathering-exit.md)
entries.source: qc1 C-002 (V1.33 P3); also flagged in implementer Completion Report §7 nuance #1
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P3 fix wave (commit c604a2d) — LlmJudgeTask has with_resolved_template() that pre-loads file content from bundle root via read_embedded_template; path safety enforced at preset load time by assert_template_file_safe.
entries.closure_evidence: commit c604a2d on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; presets novel-writing, reflection-loop, research updated.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit c604a2d on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; presets novel-writing, reflection-loop, research updated.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

Pre-1.0 local-first: P1D/P7D already work (D unit supported); P1M/P1Y correctly returns None (no throttle); calendar durations cannot be precisely converted to chrono::Duration. Single-user invariant documented in code.
Pre-1.0 local-first single-user: attacker model does not apply. Single-user invariant documented in code.
